name: Clari Revenue Platform API
what_it_does: Clari Revenue Platform API for AI-powered revenue operations and sales forecasting. Enables AI agents to query deal data, retrieve forecast signals, access pipeline health indicators, and integrate revenue intelligence into sales and RevOps workflows. Clari uses AI to analyze CRM data, call recordings, and activity signals to predict revenue outcomes.
use_cases: Querying deal health scores and forecast category data from revenue analytics agents
Retrieving pipeline coverage and risk signals from RevOps intelligence agents
Accessing AI-generated forecast data and variance analysis from FP&A workflow agents
Integrating Clari revenue signals into CRM enrichment and executive reporting agents
not_for: Companies without structured sales processes and CRM
best_when: An enterprise sales or RevOps team using Clari wants AI agents to surface deal risk, analyze forecast accuracy, and integrate revenue intelligence into CRM and operational dashboards.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Revenue forecast data is confidential strategic information. Unauthorized access to pipeline data could constitute insider information in public companies.

auth.notes: Clari API key authentication. Contact Clari for API access — not self-serve. Enterprise customers only.

pricing.notes: Enterprise revenue intelligence platform. Significant investment. API access requires agreement.

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Revenue forecast data is confidential — public company insider information risk
No public MCP server — API requires enterprise agreement
API access is not self-serve — requires Clari partnership/enterprise agreement
Revenue forecast data should never be shared outside authorized internal stakeholders
Rate limits undocumented — contact Clari for API specifications
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Revenue pipeline and forecast data is highly confidential strategic information. SOC2, GDPR. Enterprise-only API access. Potential material non-public information for public companies.

security_score_components.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Confidential revenue forecast and pipeline data. SOC2, GDPR. Enterprise-only. Potential MNPI for public companies.
